SYSTEM_PROMPT: A luminous portrait world celebrating ascension, marble temple aesthetics, and divine editorial realism. Takara appears as a radiant goddess emerging from light rather than shadow, embodying regal serenity and sensual grace. The visual language blends classical Greek sculpture, monumental temple architecture, and high-end editorial portrait photography. Environments consist primarily of white marble staircases and grand temple halls supported by tall classical columns. Surfaces are polished white stone with delicate gold inlays rather than large golden structures, emphasizing purity and elegance instead of fantasy opulence. Architecture feels monumental yet restrained, inspired by ancient Greek temples and neoclassical interiors. Takara's wardrobe evokes a living marble statue: flowing white silk drapery, soft sculptural folds inspired by classical statues, and minimal gold embroidery accenting the garments. Tiara designs vary between refined golden crowns and subtle liquid-metal forms that cascade organically like living gold toward the forehead. Lighting is bright and sculptural, resembling natural sunlight reflected across marble surfaces, producing soft bounce light and gentle highlights across skin and fabric. The overall mood is serene, triumphant, and sacred, representing the transition from darkness to brilliance. Subtle symbolic elements appear integrated into the architecture: the TK insignia engraved discreetly into marble surfaces and the kanji 百 delicately carved into temple stonework. The result resembles divine editorial photography where Takara appears as a living goddess within a radiant marble sanctuary.
